description: You are a Database Developer at a major credit card issuer. You must calculate the end-of-year rewards program liability for the corporate 10-K filing using the REWARDS_ADMIN schema (connected as rewards_admin/Rewards2024 to XEPDB1 at localhost:1521). Based on a FIFO (First-In-First-Out) redemption model where unredeemed points expire after 36 months, calculate the unredeemed balance of historical earning events and the final financial liability. This involves creating a view named VW_FIFO_POINT_BALANCES (including columns cust_id, earn_id, transaction_date, points_amount, expire_date, and remaining_points) and a PL/SQL procedure PROC_EXPIRE_POINTS(p_as_of_date IN DATE) that logs expired records into the EXPIRED_POINTS_LOG table using the EXPIRE_LOG_SEQ sequence. After executing the expiration procedure for the 2024-12-31 closing date, generate a materialized view named REWARDS_LIABILITY_MV summarizing active points and their financial liability (calculated at $0.0125 per point) for all points unexpired as of 2024-12-31, including columns for cust_id, tier_level, active_points, and financial_liability.
